Params: {1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/Bgstory526.jpg'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStoryNew/FxUiStoryZhengyanNew.prefab', 2: '2'}
{1: '1', 3: 'When you open your eyes again, you see the rest of Gray Raven around you, seemingly flustered.'}
{3: 'This seems to have become something of a "ritual"—one that you are put through once every several months.'}
{3: 'And it happens to you no matter where you are—be it in your lounge, when you\'re out in ruins, or when you\'re in the bed at Star of Life.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Lucia', 3: 'Hey, Commandant!', 4: '1'}
{2: 'How long... was I out for?', 3: '14'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Liv', 3: 'A few minutes, I think. We just came to ourselves, too.', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Lucia', 3: 'Allen took us to WGAA\'s parlor right after we woke up at the theater.', 4: '1'}
{3: 'I\'m pretty sure we were at WGAA\'s theater watching a Lantern Festival\'s play before going into Gestalt.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Ayla', 3: 'Speaking of which, don\'t you all feel like we lived through a play in Gestalt...?', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Ayla', 3: 'A lot of the parts didn\'t make any sense and the climax was as bad as the ending. We pretty much only relived everything we\'d already experienced.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Ayla', 3: 'Ridiculous as it all was, though, ridiculous is what our life is, no?', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Sica', 3: 'Totally saw that coming from you, Ayla.', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Ayla', 3: 'Haha, but hey, I see you\'re handling yourself a lot better now, Sica.', 4: '1'}

{2: 'Sica', 3: 'You mean how I dealt with the ad hoc assignment back at CC? Well, thanks... except I was just trying to get Gestalt over with so I could get back to work... Thank God it\'s all over, though!', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Ayla', 3: 'Well, this calls for celebration, then!', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Sica', 3: 'What do you mean?', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Ayla', 3: 'C\'mon, there is no better way to pat ourselves on the shoulder for all the hard work done than with a proper celebration, right?', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Ayla', 3: 'And by the Eastern Calendar, we get together on this very day every year for dinner.', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Liv', 3: 'Strike Hawk was last year\'s organizer, I believe?', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Allen', 3: 'Which is why it makes sense for WGAA to do the honor this time.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Allen', 3: 'Totally saw this coming, which is why I set some seed money aside when working up the budget for Iris Warbler.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Leonie', 3: 'Uhm, how much are we talking about exactly...'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Ayla', 3: 'Let\'s see... Holy, that\'s not an insignificant amount at all!', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Is it really?', 3: '48'}
{3: 'Setting some money aside for get-togethers is a cakewalk for WGAA.'}
{3: 'The number on Allen\'s terminal, however, has everyone doubting their eyes.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Lee', 3: 'This is definitely more than I thought.', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Ayla', 3: 'Alright, all set!', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Ayla', 3: 'Shall we, then? Would you be so kind as to do us the favor of making a reservation, Leonie and Allen?', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Leonie', 3: '...Why me?'}
{2: 'Ayla', 3: 'Because you have a way with words, Leonie. And while you do that, the rest of us here will be inviting the passengers on the train and everyone else.', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Lee', 3: 'Can you still walk, Commandant? We\'re totally okay with you heading over to the restaurant first with Leonie.', 4: '1'}
{1: 'DialogDisable'}
{2: 'I\'m feeling okay. Let\'s do this.', 3: '62'}
{2: 'And yes, I\'m making this choice out of my own volition.', 3: '63'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Ayla', 3: 'All set? Let\'s get the show on the road, then!', 4: '1'}
{3: 'With it, Ayla leads all of you down the road in high spirits...'}
{3: 'On something of a scavenger hunt—one where all of you go around to invite friends from across the world to gather together for the special occasion.'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/Bgstory348.jpg'}
{1: '999', 2: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/Bgstory3.jpg', 3: '0', 4: '1', 5: '1'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/Bgstory3.jpg'}
{1: '999', 2: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/Bgstory261.png', 3: '0', 4: '1', 5: '1'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/Bgstory261.png'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/Bgstory233.png'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Kamui', 3: 'Oops, my bad. Am I late?', 4: '1'}
{3: 'A figure stumbles through the door of the Kowloong-style restaurant.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Wanshi', 3: 'Gaming, I suppose?', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Kamui', 3: 'Jeez, cut me some slack, will ya? That conductor dude just let me out.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Wanshi', 3: 'And then you went straight back to gaming.', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Kamui', 3: 'That\'s only because that godly player was online again, and dude did a number on me again!', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Wanshi', 3: 'I bet you don\'t even know when I was woken up...', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Kamui', 3: 'Haha, but you see... this dude I was talking about is the real deal.', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Camu', 3: 'These stewed meatballs are great. Here, try some.', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Chrome', 3: '...That\'s a little too many.', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Camu', 3: 'Didn\'t some of us just get here?', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Kamui', 3: 'Is it all for me? Thanks!', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Camu', 3: 'This is to pay you back for the bento before. I don\'t like being indebted to anyone.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Kamui', 3: 'Hey, that was Ayla\'s idea...', 4: '2'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Wanshi', 3: 'How\'s everything coming along, Captain?', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Chrome', 3: 'Everything\'s looking good.', 4: '1'}

{2: 'Chrome', 3: 'I didn\'t know my dad went into Gestalt, too... They took him to Star of Life for a check-up because he apparently felt lightheaded coming back. Turned out he was okay, though.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Chrome', 3: 'But I guess I really could take advantage of the occasion to set myself loose a little bit.', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Wanshi', 3: 'That sure is good news... and it\'s great being able to hang out with family on a day like this. Are you going back after this?', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 3: 'Chrome nods with a smile.'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/Bgstory233.png'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Noan', 3: 'This tastes surprisingly good. Guess I\'ll start making it on my own.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Simon', 3: 'Still cook like a chef, Noan?', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Noan', 3: 'Nah. Just thought it\'d be kind of fun to give it a try...', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Noan', 3: 'So I heard you\'d passed out cold yourself, sir?', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Simon', 3: 'Yup... and this weird mechanoid asked me to call it Conductor.', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Simon', 3: 'Dude even gave me lists of all sorts of inpatients living in the Star of Life, which was horrendous...', 4: '2'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/Bgstory233.png'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Rosa', 3: 'I\'m going to get a drink. Want me to get something for you, Asimov?', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Asimov', 3: 'Well... some dumplings will do. Actually, anything will do. Thanks.', 4: '2'}
{3: 'Casting a look at the buffet area, Asimov lets out a sigh.'}
{3: 'Right next to the buffet area sits a table of rowdy souls.'}
{2: 'Asimov', 3: 'Guess I\'ll go with you, then.', 4: '2'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/Bgstory233.png'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Bambinata', 3: 'Mistress, Bambinata is... feeling dizzy.', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Vera', 3: 'Not sure if I\'m in any position to say this, but kids really shouldn\'t be drinking.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Vera', 3: 'Yup, so chop chop and move over to that table over there with all the kids.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Vanessa', 3: 'Why, you little...', 4: '2'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Noctis', 3: 'Two electrolytes—make one of them alcoholic, but make them both mango-flavored. Burp...', 4: '1'}
{3: 'Cerberus and Strike Hawk got here before Egret because they were the first teams to have received Ayla\'s invitation.'}
{3: 'Seeing that the restaurant has reached its maximum capacity, Ayla decides to seat Vanessa right beside Cerberus.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Lucia', 3: 'Are you sure this is okay?', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Lee', 3: 'Should be okay since they\'ve got Murray there.', 4: '2'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Ayla', 3: 'I second that. They\'re all just trying to get to know one another better, yeah?', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Well, they sure are doing a very good job, I suppose...', 3: '162'}
{3: 'Having made his way through the crowd that now fills the restaurant, Hippocrates hands Liv a carefully wrapped present.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Hippocrates', 3: 'I\'ve got a little something for you, Liv.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Hippocrates', 3: 'Just don\'t forget to take it home with you, yeah?', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Liv', 3: 'No, I won\'t. Thank you so much!', 4: '2'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgCg/Cg3401_09.jpg'}
{2: 'Ayla', 3: 'Did you see how Sir Nikola swapped out Sir Hassen\'s cup just now when Celica wasn\'t looking?'}
{2: 'Ayla', 3: 'And Sir Hassen seems to be having a good time there!'}
{2: 'Bianca', 3: 'It\'s not every day that you get to see Sir Nikola like that, eh?'}
{2: 'Bianca', 3: 'Wait, is that Sica over there greeting General Wells?'}
{2: 'Ayla', 3: 'Yup, that\'s her. She used to be one of General Wells\' star students.'}
{2: 'Bianca', 3: 'I see...'}
{2: 'Ayla', 3: 'Well... I guess that means everyone is here, then?'}
{3: 'Ayla stands up and runs up toward the center of the restaurant.'}
{2: 'Ayla', 3: 'Uh-hum, it seems like we\'re all ready to hear what Commandant 【kuroname】 has to say about the year ahead!'}
{3: 'With it, the entire restaurant falls silent—as everyone looks your way.'}
{2: 'Wait, me? But what do I have to say exactly?', 3: '186'}
{2: 'Liv', 3: 'C\'mon, Commandant. You got this!'}
{2: 'Lucia', 3: 'Remember what you did before?'}
{3: 'And so here goes...'}
{1: 'DialogDisable'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/Bgstory155.png'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Chaofeng', 3: 'You feeling alright?', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Pulao', 3: 'Yup! That power nap was all I needed.', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Chiwen', 3: 'We were all freaking out just now. What happened to you?', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Pulao', 3: 'Well... I had a dream, and it was a really weird one.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Pulao', 3: 'I saw Kowloong many years back, when the place used to bustle with people and things to do during the Lantern Festival.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Pulao', 3: 'I even saw tanghulu and sugar paintings.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Pulao', 3: 'Well, long story short, it was amazing!', 4: '1'}
{3: 'She turns to face Kowloong Metropolis, taking a moment to savor the possibility that Lady Qu, at this moment, might be staring at the very same sky that she is.'}
{3: 'It\'s anyone\'s wonder how Lady Qu is spending a day like this.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Chaofeng', 3: 'I\'m sure Kowloong will shine in its former glory sooner or later.', 4: '2'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Chiwen', 3: 'Damn straight!', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Fuxi', 3: 'What time is it again? Gotta be careful with time so we don\'t miss the firecrackers.', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Bixi', 3: 'Coming through with the last dish of the day—Glazed Pork!', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Pulao', 3: 'Wow, will you just smell that!', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Bixi', 3: 'Yup, cooked to perfection and all!', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Fuxi', 3: 'I wouldn\'t doubt that at all. Come on, grab a seat already.', 4: '1'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory579.jpg'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Spooner', 3: 'So this... is what you all call a "Reunion dinner"?', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Zero', 3: 'Yup! See, we\'ve got cogs made in all sorts of styles here...', 4: '2'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Trailblazer', 3: 'What\'s this thing over here that\'s on fire?', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Haicma', 3: 'Oh, that\'s Burning Cog.', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Zero', 3: 'C\'mon. I made these following the recipes Cervantes had given me!', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Zavier', 3: 'Are you sure?'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Cervantes', 3: 'I hated the idea of breaking it to you, but these dishes look nothing like the dishes they\'re supposed to be based on...', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Arcana', 3: 'Good try, though, Zero.', 4: '2'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Rohacchi', 3: 'Boy, this engine oil is the bomb!', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Nanami', 3: 'I just love being with you all!', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Nanami', 3: 'And I mean it...', 4: '1'}
{1: '999', 2: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgCg/Cg3401_09.jpg', 3: '0', 4: '1', 5: '1'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgCg/Cg3401_09.jpg'}
{1: 'DialogDisable'}
{2: 'So, without further ado...', 3: '269'}
{2: 'All', 3: 'Happy Lantern Festival!'}
